mandatory_steps.name: Immutable strategy freeze
mandatory_steps.rule: No changes to fields, signs, weights, model, alpha, target or event exclusions.

mandatory_steps.name: Prospective-only event accumulation
mandatory_steps.rule: Use only releases occurring after 2026-07-17; every eligible event remains in the denominator.

mandatory_steps.name: Strict PIT expectation source
mandatory_steps.rule: Store a pre-release snapshot timestamp, provider/version ID, raw bytes and hash.

mandatory_steps.name: Executable post-release prices
mandatory_steps.rule: Evaluate entries at fixed 08:30+5s, +30s, +1m and +5m with bid/ask and slippage.

mandatory_steps.name: Memory-control benchmark
mandatory_steps.rule: Run identical code on anonymized event IDs/dates and on matched lower-exposure assets without LLM re-optimization.

mandatory_steps.name: Fixed discovery budget
mandatory_steps.rule: Candidate count is one; no new variants until the prospective verdict is recorded.

mandatory_steps.name: Sequential promotion threshold
mandatory_steps.rule: Require economically positive post-cost returns, calibrated direction, stability across CPI/labor and no single-era dependence.

mandatory_steps.name: Independent reproducibility
mandatory_steps.rule: A separate runtime must reproduce hashes, signals and fills without conversational context.
